title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Marines, Unknown person #1, Garp, Unknown person #2, York, Celestial Dragons as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are 150 rare "Rabbits" to hunt down!! That's not to mention the 13 Super Rare Ones!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, single hit kills will also earn you a skill bonus!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've prepared extravagant prizes for the winners of this prestigious event!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our reports haven't been verified... but if the danger is real, it'll be a disaster!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Navy HQ

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is about the celestial Dragon's little field trip, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you want me to go way out to the boonies to fight?! what's the point?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why should I care if they're trouble? I always said it'd come back to bite you if you messed with Hachnosu. It's their own fault for poking the hivei

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't say, GARP, but we need you there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "I'm not

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You pests can just sit back and watch.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't count on an easy victory, darling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please, someone wake me from this nightmare!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How is this allowed to happen?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can they toy with the lives of their fellow man...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Manneyek family is going to win!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AHAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did they expect? You don't just swipe the crown jewel of Pirate Island!! Of course they'd come to get it back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where in the world did you hear about that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must've assigned them extra protection to compensate for their stupidity, right? So, what's got you so flustered?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, there's something we didn't account for...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please desist and respect the rules!! We haven't started yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AHAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kyaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Consider the other 200 nobles participating!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's only one hour before the hunt begins!! Now run little rabbits...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Give us a good chase!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems Roger's on the move there too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lead with that next time!! I'm on my way!!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Hachinosu (pirate Island), New World

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The rocks pirates have already set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: They beat us to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We've gotta get going too, hurry up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is going to shake the pirate world to its core!!

dialogue.speaker: Celestial Dragons
dialogue.text: God Valley, West Blue

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have never witnessed so many ships gather around a single island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PANT... PAINT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As you can see, we are trapped in this hellish reality!! Nobody will be able to escape...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And one day it will be forgotten and lost to history!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They chose this place for their little murder festival just to claim the natural resources here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 10,000 Civilians have been branded *Rabbits* for this hunt...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not a single one will still be alive in three weeks time!! Can you believe that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How is this world fair?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they said we'd be freed if we survived the full three weeks till the end of the festival...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Like hell you will!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In all their previous hunts, there were exactly ZERO survivors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But why would they lie about that and give us false hope...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no thrill for them in killing people who have already given up!! They want you to hope and run, so they have a good chase.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will never Vin if you play their rigged game!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Focus on escaping it altogether!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 51 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
